computerReply: Automatic defense procedures initiated. Energy field strength increasing. Warning, shield penetration seventeen percent.
situationalContext: Data, the only conscious crew member, activates emergency defense protocols on the Bridge as the ship is being affected by an energy field.
userQuery: Computer, engage emergency plan zed zed alpha.

situationalContext: Data, attempting to counter an energy field, orders the computer to randomly fluctuate the ship's shield frequencies.
userQuery: Computer, begin random fluctuation of shield frequency and modulation.

situationalContext: Data instructs the computer to release a compound into the airflow system to revive the incapacitated crew.
userQuery: Computer, release compound ADTH into the airflow system, five parts per million.
